passage_title: Materials to take us beyond concrete

sentences.sentence: Concrete is the second most used substance in the global economy, after water – and one of the world's biggest single sources of greenhouse gas emissions.
sentences.translation: 混凝土是全球经济中使用量第二大的物质，仅次于水，同时也是世界上最大的单一温室气体排放源之一。

structure.text: is the second most used substance in the global economy
and one of the world's biggest single sources of greenhouse gas emissions

difficult_points: 破折号后的 and one of... 与前面的表语并列，补充说明混凝土的排放影响。
the second most used substance 是最高级结构中的序数表达，表示使用量排名第二。
single sources 强调单一来源，而不是多个来源合计。

sentences.sentence: The chemical process by which cement, the key ingredient of concrete, is created results in large quantities of carbon dioxide.
sentences.translation: 制造水泥这一混凝土关键成分的化学过程，会产生大量二氧化碳。

structure.text: by which cement, the key ingredient of concrete, is created
results in large quantities of carbon dioxide

difficult_points: by which 引导定语从句，修饰 process，说明水泥通过这一过程被制造出来。
the key ingredient of concrete 是 cement 的同位语。
result in 表示“导致、产生”，宾语是 large quantities of carbon dioxide。

sentences.sentence: The UN estimates that there will be 9.8 billion people living on the planet by mid-century.
sentences.translation: 联合国估计，到本世纪中叶，地球上将有98亿人口。

structure.text: that there will be 9.8 billion people living on the planet by mid-century

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明估计的具体内容。
there will be 是将来时存在句，核心信息是 9.8 billion people。
living on the planet 是现在分词短语，修饰 people。

sentences.sentence: They will need somewhere to live.
sentences.translation: 他们将需要住处。
difficult_points: They 指代上一句提到的 9.8 billion people。
somewhere to live 中不定式修饰 somewhere，表示居住的地方。
will need 表示未来人口增长带来的需求。

sentences.sentence: If concrete is the only answer to the construction of new cities, then carbon emissions will soar, aggravating global warming.
sentences.translation: 如果混凝土是建设新城市的唯一答案，那么碳排放将会飙升，从而加剧全球变暖。

structure.text: If concrete is the only answer to the construction of new cities

difficult_points: If 引导条件从句，说明碳排放飙升的前提。
the only answer to 表示“唯一解决办法”，这里指城市建设材料选择。
aggravating global warming 是现在分词短语，说明碳排放飙升的结果。

sentences.sentence: And so scientists have started innovating with other materials, in a scramble for alternatives to a universal commodity that has underpinned our modern life for many years.
sentences.translation: 因此，科学家们已经开始用其他材料进行创新，争相寻找这种多年来支撑现代生活的通用商品的替代品。

structure.text: have started innovating with other materials
in a scramble for alternatives to a universal commodity
that has underpinned our modern life for many years

difficult_points: And so 表示因果承接，回应前文混凝土排放问题。
have started innovating 使用现在完成时，说明行动已经开始并与现在相关。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 a universal commodity，即混凝土。

sentences.sentence: The problem with replacing concrete is that it is so very good at what it does.
sentences.translation: 替代混凝土的问题在于，它本身非常擅长完成自己的用途。

structure.text: that it is so very good at what it does

difficult_points: 主语是 The problem with replacing concrete，而不是 concrete。
that 引导表语从句，解释问题的具体内容。
what it does 指混凝土在建筑中的功能和表现。

expressions.text: be good at what it does

sentences.sentence: Chris Cheeseman, an engineering professor at Imperial College London, says the key thing to consider is the extent to which concrete is used around the world, and is likely to continue to be used.
sentences.translation: 伦敦帝国理工学院工程学教授克里斯·奇斯曼说，需要考虑的关键是混凝土在全球的使用程度，以及它可能会继续被使用到什么程度。

structure.text: an engineering professor at Imperial College London
the key thing to consider is the extent
to which concrete is used around the world, and is likely to continue to be used

difficult_points: 逗号中的 an engineering professor... 是 Chris Cheeseman 的同位语。
says 后省略 that，后面是宾语从句。
to which 引导定语从句，修饰 extent，表示“达到何种程度”。
is likely to continue to be used 是被动结构，说明未来仍可能广泛使用。

sentences.sentence: 'Concrete is not a high-carbon product.
sentences.translation: “混凝土并不是高碳产品。
difficult_points: 句首开放引号说明这是直接引语的开头。
not 否定的是 a high-carbon product，表达对混凝土本身碳属性的区分。
high-carbon 是复合形容词，修饰 product。

sentences.sentence: Cement is high carbon, but concrete is not.
sentences.translation: 水泥是高碳的，但混凝土不是。
difficult_points: but 连接两个对比分句，区分水泥与混凝土。
concrete is not 后省略 high carbon，避免重复。
high carbon 在此作表语，表示碳排放属性高。

sentences.sentence: But it is the scale on which it is used that makes it high carbon.
sentences.translation: 但正是它的使用规模使它成为高碳材料。
difficult_points: 这是 it is...that 强调句，强调 the scale 是造成高碳影响的关键。
on which it is used 修饰 scale，表示使用规模。
makes it high carbon 中 it 指 concrete。

sentences.sentence: The sheer scale of manufacture is so huge, that is the issue.'
sentences.translation: 制造规模实在太大了，这才是问题所在。”
difficult_points: sheer 强调规模之大，语气比普通 large 更强。
that is the issue 是总结性分句，指出真正的问题。
句末引号关闭了从 B-03 开始的直接引语。

sentences.sentence: Not only are the ingredients of concrete relatively cheap and found in abundance in most places around the globe, the stuff itself has marvellous properties: Portland cement, the vital component of concrete, is mouldable and pourable, but quickly sets hard.
sentences.translation: 混凝土的原料不仅相对便宜，而且在全球大多数地方都很充足；这种材料本身还具有出色的特性：作为混凝土关键组成部分的波特兰水泥可塑、可浇筑，但很快会凝结变硬。

structure.text: Not only are the ingredients of concrete relatively cheap and found in abundance in most places around the globe
the stuff itself has marvellous properties
Portland cement, the vital component of concrete, is mouldable and pourable

difficult_points: Not only 位于句首触发倒装，are 提前到主语 the ingredients 前。
冒号后的 Portland cement 具体说明 marvellous properties 的表现。
mouldable and pourable 与 sets hard 形成材料施工时柔软、随后变硬的对比。

sentences.sentence: Cheeseman also notes another advantage: concrete and steel have similar thermal expansion properties, so steel can be used to reinforce concrete, making it far stronger and more flexible as a building material than it could be on its own.
sentences.translation: 奇斯曼还指出另一个优势：混凝土和钢材具有相似的热膨胀特性，因此钢材可以用来加固混凝土，使其作为建筑材料比单独使用时更坚固、更灵活。

structure.text: concrete and steel have similar thermal expansion properties
so steel can be used to reinforce concrete
making it far stronger and more flexible as a building material than it could be on its own

difficult_points: 冒号后的内容解释 another advantage 是什么。
so 引导结果分句，说明相似热膨胀特性带来的工程用途。
making it... 是现在分词短语，it 指 reinforced concrete。
than it could be on its own 表示与混凝土单独使用时相比。

sentences.sentence: According to Cheeseman, all these factors together make concrete hard to beat.
sentences.translation: 据奇斯曼所说，所有这些因素共同使混凝土很难被超越。
difficult_points: According to Cheeseman 表明观点来源，不是句子主干。
all these factors together 指前文的成本、来源、性能和钢筋兼容性等因素。
make concrete hard to beat 是“make + 宾语 + 宾补”结构。

expressions.meaning_zh: 所有这些因素共同作用

sentences.sentence: 'Concrete is amazing stuff.
sentences.translation: “混凝土是一种了不起的材料。
difficult_points: 句首开放引号表示直接引语开始。
stuff 在这里是口语化表达，指“材料、东西”。
amazing 体现说话者对混凝土性能的高度评价。

expressions.meaning_zh: 了不起的东西；出色的材料

sentences.sentence: Making anything with similar properties is going to be very difficult.'
sentences.translation: 制造出任何具有相似特性的东西都会非常困难。”
difficult_points: Making anything with similar properties 是动名词短语作主语。
with similar properties 修饰 anything，说明替代材料需要具备的性能。
is going to be 表示对未来难度的判断。

sentences.sentence: A possible alternative to concrete is wood.
sentences.translation: 木材是混凝土的一个可能替代品。
difficult_points: alternative to 表示“……的替代品”，介词固定用 to。
句子结构简单，但重点是把 wood 引入为替代材料。
possible 表示潜在可行，不等于已经完全替代。

sentences.sentence: Making buildings from wood may seem like a rather medieval idea, but climate change is driving architects to turn to treated timber as a possible resource.
sentences.translation: 用木材建造建筑可能听起来像是相当中世纪的想法，但气候变化正促使建筑师把经过处理的木材视为一种可能的资源。

structure.text: may seem like a rather medieval idea
but climate change is driving architects
to turn to treated timber as a possible resource

difficult_points: Making buildings from wood 是动名词短语作主语。
may seem like 表示“可能看起来像”，不是作者直接认定它落后。
drive sb to do 表示促使某人采取行动，气候变化是推动因素。

sentences.sentence: Recent years have seen the emergence of tall buildings constructed almost entirely from timber.
sentences.translation: 近年来，人们已经看到几乎完全由木材建造的高层建筑出现。
difficult_points: Recent years have seen 是拟人化表达，表示近年来出现了某种现象。
constructed almost entirely from timber 是过去分词短语，修饰 tall buildings。
almost entirely 强调木材使用比例很高。

sentences.sentence: Vancouver, Vienna and Brumunddal in Norway are all home to constructed tall, wooden buildings.
sentences.translation: 温哥华、维也纳以及挪威的布鲁蒙达尔都拥有已建成的木质高层建筑。

structure.text: Vancouver, Vienna and Brumunddal in Norway

difficult_points: 三个城市并列作主语，Brumunddal 后的 in Norway 说明地点。
be home to 表示“拥有、是……所在地”。
constructed 在这里表示已建成的，不是谓语动词。

sentences.sentence: Using wood to construct buildings, however, is not straightforward.
sentences.translation: 然而，用木材建造建筑并不简单。
difficult_points: Using wood to construct buildings 是动名词短语作主语。
however 插入主语和谓语之间，表示转折。
not straightforward 表示过程复杂，并非直截了当。

sentences.sentence: Wood expands as it absorbs moisture from the air and is susceptible to pests, not to mention fire.
sentences.translation: 木材会在吸收空气中的水分时膨胀，而且容易受虫害影响，更不用说火灾了。

structure.text: as it absorbs moisture from the air

difficult_points: as 引导时间状语从句，说明木材吸湿时会膨胀。
is susceptible to 与 expands 并列，共用主语 Wood。
not to mention fire 补充更明显的风险，语气上递进。

sentences.sentence: But treating wood and combining it with other materials can improve its properties.
sentences.translation: 但是，对木材进行处理并将其与其他材料结合，可以改善它的性能。

structure.text: treating wood and combining it with other materials

difficult_points: treating wood 和 combining it with other materials 并列作主语。
it 指代 wood，its properties 也指木材的性能。
can improve 表示处理和复合材料使用带来的可能效果。

sentences.sentence: Cross-laminated timber is engineered wood.
sentences.translation: 交叉层压木材是一种工程木材。
difficult_points: Cross-laminated timber 是专有材料名称，指交叉层压木材。
engineered wood 表示经过工程加工设计的木材，而非天然整木。
本句为定义句，引出后文制作方式。

sentences.sentence: An adhesive is used to stick layers of solid-sawn timber together, crosswise, to form building blocks.
sentences.translation: 人们使用黏合剂把多层实锯木横向粘合在一起，形成建筑构件。

structure.text: to stick layers of solid-sawn timber together

difficult_points: is used 是被动语态，强调黏合剂的用途。
to stick... 和 to form... 都是不定式短语，分别表示直接用途和结果。
crosswise 插入其中，说明木层交叉排列的方向。

sentences.sentence: This material is light but has the strength of concrete and steel.
sentences.translation: 这种材料很轻，却具有混凝土和钢材的强度。

structure.text: but has the strength of concrete and steel

difficult_points: This material 指代上一句形成的交叉层压木材。
but 连接轻质与高强度这两个看似相反的特点。
has the strength of concrete and steel 表示强度可与混凝土和钢材相比。

sentences.sentence: Construction experts say that wooden buildings can be constructed at a greater speed than ones of concrete and steel and the process, it seems, is quieter.
sentences.translation: 建筑专家表示，木结构建筑的建造速度可以比混凝土和钢结构建筑更快，而且这个过程似乎也更安静。

structure.text: that wooden buildings can be constructed at a greater speed than ones of concrete and steel
and the process, it seems, is quieter

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明专家的观点。
ones 指代 buildings，避免重复 wooden buildings 或 concrete and steel buildings。
it seems 是插入语，降低语气的绝对性。
can be constructed 是被动语态，强调建筑被建造的速度。

sentences.sentence: Stora Enso is Europe's biggest supplier of cross-laminated timber, and its vice-president Markus Mannström reports that the company is seeing increasing demand globally for building in wood, with climate change concerns the key driver.
sentences.translation: 斯道拉恩索是欧洲最大的交叉层压木材供应商，其副总裁马库斯·曼斯特罗姆表示，公司正在全球范围内看到木结构建筑需求不断增长，而气候变化担忧是关键驱动因素。

structure.text: Stora Enso is Europe's biggest supplier of cross-laminated timber
and its vice-president Markus Mannström reports
that the company is seeing increasing demand globally for building in wood
with climate change concerns the key driver

difficult_points: and 连接公司背景介绍和副总裁的报告内容。
that 引导 reports 的宾语从句。
is seeing increasing demand 使用现在进行时，强调需求正在增长。
with climate change concerns the key driver 是 with 复合结构，说明需求增长的主要原因。

expressions.meaning_zh: 全球范围内不断增长的需求

sentences.sentence: Finland, with its large forests, where Stora Enso is based, has been leading the way, but the company is seeing a rise in demand for its timber products across the world, including in Asia.
sentences.translation: 斯道拉恩索总部所在的芬兰拥有大片森林，一直处于领先地位；不过该公司看到其木材产品在全球范围内的需求正在上升，包括亚洲地区。

structure.text: but the company is seeing a rise in demand for its timber products across the world

difficult_points: with its large forests 和 where Stora Enso is based 都补充说明 Finland。
has been leading the way 是现在完成进行时，强调芬兰长期并持续领先。
but 后转向公司在全球需求上升的现状。
including in Asia 补充需求增长覆盖的地区。

sentences.sentence: Of course, using timber in a building also locks away the carbon that it absorbed as it grew.
sentences.translation: 当然，在建筑中使用木材还会把它生长过程中吸收的碳封存起来。

structure.text: that it absorbed as it grew

difficult_points: using timber in a building 是动名词短语作主语。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 the carbon。
as it grew 表示木材作为树木生长时吸收碳的阶段。
locks away 暗示碳被储存在建筑木材中。

sentences.sentence: But even treated wood has its limitations and only when a wider range of construction projects has been proven in practice will it be possible to see wood as a real alternative to concrete in constructing tall buildings.
sentences.translation: 但是，即使经过处理的木材也有其局限，只有当更广泛的建筑项目在实践中得到验证时，人们才可能把木材视为建造高层建筑时混凝土的真正替代品。

structure.text: But even treated wood has its limitations
only when a wider range of construction projects has been proven in practice
a wider range of construction projects
will it be possible to see wood as a real alternative to concrete in constructing tall buildings

difficult_points: even treated wood 强调即便木材经过处理也仍有局限。
only when 位于句首触发主句倒装，形成 will it be possible 的顺序。
has been proven 是现在完成时被动语态，强调项目需要经过实践验证。
see wood as a real alternative to concrete 表示把木材视为真正替代品。

sentences.sentence: Fly ash and slag from iron ore are possible alternatives to cement in a concrete mix.
sentences.translation: 粉煤灰和铁矿石矿渣可能成为混凝土配比中水泥的替代品。

structure.text: Fly ash and slag from iron ore

difficult_points: Fly ash and slag from iron ore 并列作主语。
alternatives to cement 中 to 表示替代对象。
in a concrete mix 限定替代发生在混凝土配比中。

sentences.sentence: Fly ash, a byproduct of coal-burning power plants, can be incorporated into concrete mixes to make up as much as 15 to 30% of the cement, without harming the strength or durability of the resulting mix.
sentences.translation: 粉煤灰是燃煤电厂的副产品，可以掺入混凝土配比中，占水泥用量的15%到30%之多，同时不会损害最终混合物的强度或耐久性。

structure.text: a byproduct of coal-burning power plants
can be incorporated into concrete mixes
to make up as much as 15 to 30% of the cement
without harming the strength or durability of the resulting mix

difficult_points: a byproduct... 是 Fly ash 的同位语，说明来源。
can be incorporated 是被动语态，表示可被掺入。
to make up... 表示掺入后所占比例。
without harming... 说明这种替代不会削弱强度或耐久性。

sentences.sentence: Iron-ore slag, a byproduct of the iron-ore smelting process, can be used in a similar way.
sentences.translation: 铁矿石矿渣是铁矿石冶炼过程的副产品，也可以以类似方式使用。

structure.text: a byproduct of the iron-ore smelting process

difficult_points: 同位语说明 Iron-ore slag 的来源。
can be used 是被动语态，强调这种材料的用途。
in a similar way 指与粉煤灰类似地替代部分水泥。

sentences.sentence: Their incorporation into concrete mixes has the potential to reduce greenhouse gas emissions.
sentences.translation: 把它们掺入混凝土配比中，有可能减少温室气体排放。
difficult_points: Their 指代前文的粉煤灰和铁矿石矿渣。
incorporation 是名词化表达，表示“掺入、加入”。
has the potential to 表示有潜力做某事，不等于已经必然实现。

sentences.sentence: But Anna Surgenor, of the UK's Green Building Council, notes that although these waste products can save carbon in the concrete mix, their use is not always straightforward.
sentences.translation: 但英国绿色建筑委员会的安娜·瑟杰诺指出，尽管这些废弃产品可以在混凝土配比中节省碳排放，它们的使用并不总是简单直接。

structure.text: of the UK's Green Building Council
that although these waste products can save carbon in the concrete mix, their use is not always straightforward
although these waste products can save carbon in the concrete mix

difficult_points: But 表示对前文潜在好处的转折和限定。
of the UK's Green Building Council 补充说明 Anna Surgenor 的机构身份。
that 引导宾语从句，although 从句嵌套其中形成让步关系。
not always straightforward 表示实际使用仍需考虑复杂条件。

sentences.sentence: 'It's possible to replace the cement content in concrete with waste products to lower the overall carbon impact.
sentences.translation: “用废弃产品替代混凝土中的水泥含量，以降低整体碳影响，这是可能的。

structure.text: to replace the cement content in concrete with waste products
to lower the overall carbon impact

difficult_points: It's possible 后真正的内容由不定式 to replace... 表达。
replace...with... 表示用废弃产品替代水泥成分。
to lower... 表示替代行为的目的。

sentences.sentence: But there are several calculations that need to be considered across the entire life cycle of the building – these include factoring in where these materials are being shipped from.
sentences.translation: 但是，需要在建筑的整个生命周期内考虑若干计算因素——其中包括把这些材料从哪里运输而来这一点纳入考量。

structure.text: that need to be considered across the entire life cycle of the building
these include factoring in where these materials are being shipped from
where these materials are being shipped from

difficult_points: There are several calculations 是存在句，引出必须考虑的因素。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 calculations。
破折号后的 these 指代 several calculations，并举例说明。
where these materials are being shipped from 是嵌入式疑问从句，作 factoring in 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: If they are transported over long distances, using fossil fuels, the use of alternative materials might not make sense from an overall carbon reduction perspective.'
sentences.translation: 如果这些材料使用化石燃料进行长距离运输，那么从整体减碳角度看，使用替代材料可能就没有意义。”

structure.text: If they are transported over long distances
from an overall carbon reduction perspective

difficult_points: If 引导条件从句，说明替代材料可能不合理的前提。
they 指代前文提到的替代材料。
using fossil fuels 是现在分词短语，补充运输方式。
from...perspective 表示评价问题的角度。

sentences.sentence: While these technologies are all promising ideas, they are either unproven or based on materials that are not abundant.
sentences.translation: 虽然这些技术都是有前景的想法，但它们要么尚未得到验证，要么依赖并不充足的材料。

structure.text: While these technologies are all promising ideas
are either unproven or based on materials

difficult_points: While 引导让步状语从句，承认技术有前景后指出限制。
either...or... 连接两个并列问题：未验证或材料不足。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 materials。

sentences.sentence: In their overview of innovation in the concrete industry, Felix Preston and Johanna Lehne of the UK's Royal Institute of International Affairs reached the conclusion that, 'Some novel cements have been discussed for more than a decade within the research community, without breaking through.
sentences.translation: 在他们对混凝土行业创新的综述中，英国皇家国际事务研究所的费利克斯·普雷斯顿和约翰娜·莱纳得出结论：“一些新型水泥已在研究界讨论了十多年，却没有取得突破。

structure.text: In their overview of innovation in the concrete industry
Felix Preston and Johanna Lehne of the UK's Royal Institute of International Affairs
that, 'Some novel cements have been discussed for more than a decade within the research community, without breaking through

difficult_points: In their overview... 是句首背景状语，说明结论来自一份综述。
Felix Preston and Johanna Lehne 是并列主语，of... 说明机构归属。
that 后接结论内容，并直接引入引语。
without breaking through 表示这些新型水泥虽被讨论多年但没有取得突破。

sentences.sentence: At present, these alternatives are rarely as cost-effective as conventional cement, and they face raw-material shortages and resistance from customers.'
sentences.translation: 目前，这些替代品很少能像传统水泥一样具有成本效益，而且它们还面临原材料短缺和客户抵触。”

structure.text: are rarely as cost-effective as conventional cement
and they face raw-material shortages and resistance from customers

difficult_points: At present 限定当前阶段，不代表未来永远如此。
as cost-effective as 是同级比较结构，rarely 表示很少达到传统水泥的成本效益。
raw-material shortages 和 resistance from customers 是 face 的两个并列宾语。
